chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
text: كَتَبَ إِلَيَّ مِنَ الْحَبْسِ أَنَّ فُلَاناً ابْنِي سَيِّدُ وُلْدِي وَ قَدْ نَحَلْتُهُ كُنْيَتِي .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali , from Ibn Muhriz, from Ali Bin Yaqteen,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> wrote to me from the prison: ‘So and so son<sup>asws</sup> of mine<sup>asws</sup> is the chief of my<sup>asws</sup> children, and<sup>asws</sup> have gifted my<sup>asws</sup> teknonym to him<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from ibn Muhriz from Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following. “Abu al-Hassan (a.s.) wrote to me from prison that so and so my son is the master and guardian of my children and I have gifted my own (Kunya, Arabic) surname.”
